title: Fareham Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Fareham, with a Z-Score of +3.26. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Fareham is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.4 GG. 
 The humidity level is relatively low at 38%, but the heat is still oppressive. 
 The wind speed of 10.1 km/h is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
